underlying_goal: Get Slack integration working for danxbot-flytebot and set up a repo-specific agent tools system
friction_detail: Multiple runtime issues emerged iteratively (msg_too_long crashes, false inactivity kills, wrong SQL column names), and programmatic testing via Docker exec failed silently.
brief_summary: User wanted Slack integration working and repo-specific tooling set up for danxbot; most issues were resolved through iterative debugging but final end-to-end testing was not completed.
